mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM dev_outside_device
del_flag = '0'
AND reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reason}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM dev_outside_device WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT * FROM dev_outside_device WHERE inout_record_id = #{inoutRecordId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM dev_outside_device WHERE actual_return_date IS NULL AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dev_outside_device (reason, quantity, note, out_date, expected_return_date, actual_return_date, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{reason}, #{quantity}, #{note}, #{outDate}, #{expectedReturnDate}, #{actualReturnDate}, '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE dev_outside_device SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dev_outside_device (reason, quantity, warehouse_category_id, inout_record_id, note, out_date, expected_return_date, actual_return_date, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{reason}, #{quantity}, #{warehouseCategoryId}, #{inoutRecordId}, #{note}, #{outDate}, #{expectedReturnDate}, NULL, '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE dev_outside_device SET actual_return_date = #{actualReturnDate}, warehouse_category_id = COALESCE(warehouse_category_id, #{warehouseCategoryId}), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE inout_record_id = #{inoutRecordId} AND actual_return_date IS NULL AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE dev_outside_device SET actual_return_date = NULL, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE inout_record_id = #{inoutRecordId} AND del_flag = '0'
